title: ego lite: I gave Claude Code & Codex a browser to run web automation — here's what happened
summary: ego lite is a Chromium-based browser designed for AI agents to perform web automation in isolated workspaces. It enables agents like Claude, Codex, and Cursor to handle web workflows through code-based composition and semantic page snapshots while maintaining separation from the user's normal browsing context.
